stemHtml:
(For this question use annex 033-043 and 033-055 rev. 05.11.2004). 
The flight crew of a turbojet aeroplane prepares a flight using the following data:

Flight leg distance: 3500 NM 
Flight level FL 310 
True airspeed: 450 kt 
Headwind component at this level: 55 kt 
Initially planned take-off mass (without extra fuel on board): 180 000 kg 
Fuel price: 0.30 Euro/l at departure 0.27 Euro/l at destination

To maximize savings, the commander decides to carry extra fuel in addition to that which is necessary.Using the appended annex, the optimum quantity of fuel which should be carried in addition to the prescribed quantity is…

options.c: The fuel transport operation is not recommended in this case.
